$comment: Speed tiers. Atoms: stat (vs base + vs final with mods), outspeeds. vs:'final' computes the level-50 stat from EVs/IVs/nature then applies mods (scarf 1.5x, tailwind 2x, paralysis 0.5x, weather speed abilities). outspeeds compares against a threat that carries its OWN scarf/mods.
name: Speed tiers

tests.title: At least 2 mons faster than base 100
tests.rationale: Raw base-speed tier check (vs:'base'), independent of investment.

tests.title: A Choice Scarf user reaches >=200 effective Speed
tests.rationale: Composes item + computed stat: holds Choice Scarf AND final Speed (x1.5 from the scarf mod) is >=200.

tests.title: Something outspeeds Scarf Garchomp
tests.rationale: outspeeds compares the member's effective Speed to the threat's (the threat applies its own x1.5 scarf). orSpeedTie counts a tie as success.

tests.title: A slow attacker for Trick Room
tests.rationale: vs:'final' with no mods; a sub-50 Speed body that wants Trick Room up.
